topic.what: Source of MEV revenue through CEX-DEX arbitrage on Ethereum
topic.how: Extended discrete-time AMM model with diffusive and stochastic jump components replacing Black-Scholes continuous-path assumption
topic.why_matters: Prior BS-based models significantly underestimated CEX-DEX arbitrage volume (predicted $208K vs $3.37M empirical); real price jumps (2 orders of magnitude larger than instantaneous volatility) drive arbitrage opportunities

characteristics.what_it_measures: Model's ability to predict CEX-DEX arbitrage volume
characteristics.evidence: Uniswap V2 ETH-USDT pool Sept 2025 empirical vs model comparison
characteristics.context: Fitted to Binance spot + Ethereum blockchain data with 7 parameters; model yields 2x empirical but captures order-of-magnitude better than BS
Discrepancy explained by multiple arbitrageurs using different CEX prices and widening bid-ask spread post-jumps

characteristics.what_it_measures: Ratio of predicted to empirical arbitrage volume
characteristics.context: BS model underpredicts by ~16x; our model underpredicts by ~2x

characteristics.what_it_measures: Maximum price jump relative to instantaneous volatility
characteristics.evidence: ETH price jump 2024-12-09 from $3542 to $3640 in 1 second
characteristics.context: Binance spot API data Nov-Dec 2024 showing jumps 2 orders of magnitude larger than instantaneous vol
Function iteration converges geometrically to invariant density f*

characteristics.what_itasures: Per-day MEV profit from CEX-DEX arbitrage
characteristics.evidence: Uniswap V2 pool empirical MEV estimation
characteristics.context: Empirical MEV includes priority fees + coinbase transfers scaled for bundles

novelty: First AMM model with combined diffusive and stochastic jump components
Proved ergodicity and geometric convergence of mispricing process
Reduced framework to BS, Merton jump diffusion, and Ornstein-Uhlenbeck as special cases
open_problems: Extension to multi-asset pools and complex AMM designs
Optimal arbitrage strategy under multiple competing arbitrageurs
Interaction between CEX-DEX arbitrage and other MEV types (sandwiches, liquidations)
